text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! The qi from the north-northeast is growing?
Its strength is gradually returning.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense! The expectations of the people in
Tomakomai are rising. They're rallying behind
Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes, with this much encouragement, Tarumae will
surely compete in the Teio Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the mentioned race, Copano
Rickey and I are reviewing the list of entrants.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae's name... it's not there. Why?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Her qi had recovered. The only thing left was for
her to accept it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback as well. Quite a bit of time has
passed since her defeat in Dubai. She should have
recovered by now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Teio Sho is the grand finale of the spring dirt
races. I was wholly convinced that she'd run...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm going to go and talk to Tarumae!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Something is wrong! I've tried to avoid talking
about the race, but if I just ask her directly, then
I'm sure—

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's best to consider what Hokko Tarumae might
be going through before approaching her
directly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we think about what she's said and done up to
now...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I actually did it! I got my first trophy for
Tomakomai!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering what I needed to do to put
Tomakomai on the map, and I figured the only
way was to make waves on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Imagine—if I win, everyone will know
Tomakomai's name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae has been consistent in saying
that her victories are for Tomakomai's benefit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, if she loses...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Guilty?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. Maybe she feels afraid to face the people
in her hometown.

Yeah. Maybe she feels afraid to face the people
in her hometown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her devastating loss in Dubai, she could be
blaming herself, thinking she's disgraced the
honor of her hometown.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae... Knowing her, I think you might be
right. But still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
She mustn't close off the window to her heart. If
she does, no breeze will reach it, and that is the
worst thing she can do feng shui-wise.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, trying to force it open will
only make matters worse... Trainer...
choice_data_list:
How about we send her some positive energy?
Out there on the track?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right. If I go to meet her right now,
it'd have the opposite effect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, on the day of the race...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Acute, let's do our best! ☆ Our fortunes are
aligned today! So...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's make this race a million times better than
the last one!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's do it, Rickey. I just hope...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I really hope that Tarumae is watching our race
too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deep down, Wonder Acute appears to
understand Hokko Tarumae's feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fierce vortex intensifies between the two. Will
their harmonious flames be able to reach Hokko
Tarumae?
